query:
INSERT INTO secure_documents (
  owner_id,
  entity_id,
  folder_id,
  title,
  description,
  document_type,
  file_path,
  mime_type,
  file_size,
  classification,
  access_level,
  requires_signature,
  blockchain_hash,
  version,
  status
) VALUES (
  1,
  1,
  NULL,
  'CALEA Freeman Family Trust - IP Documentation & System Architecture',
  'Comprehensive intellectual property documentation establishing ownership of the LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System and all associated proprietary technologies, methodologies, and business processes.',
  'legal',
  '/documents/trust/CALEA_Freeman_Family_Trust_IP_Documentation.md',
  'text/markdown',
  45000,
  'confidential',
  'owner_only',
  1,
  NULL,
  '1.0',
  'final'
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute INSERT INTO secure_documents (
  owner_id,
